mission.title: Mission
mission.detail: We are committed to innovative color mixing technology, allowing every color to precisely express emotion and creativity. Not just providing equipment, but providing a continuous source of vitality for the global color industry, making the world more vivid with color.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: Become a global leader in intelligent color mixing
vision.detail: Based in China, looking at the world. Our goal is to build an intelligent color mixing ecosystem covering the entire industry, defining the standard of future color management through continuous technological innovation, and becoming the most trusted color partner for customers.

values.title: Values
values.detail: Innovation is the driving force of development, precision is the soul of the product, service is the cornerstone of the brand, and win-win is the original intention of cooperation. We always insist on customer-centricity and never stop on the road to pursuing perfection.

story.title: Guicai: Art Unbounded by Color Mixing, Empowering New Vitality
story.p1: In the world of color, every drop of pigment carries infinite possibilities. But traditional color mixing methods are often fleeting—manual operations are time-consuming, error-prone, wasteful, and difficult to reproduce. Artists try repeatedly in front of the palette but are always bound by technical bottlenecks; on industrial production lines, the precision of liquid dispensing directly determines the vitality of the product. We ask ourselves: Why can't color last longer? Why can't creativity be freer?
story.p2: On January 6, 2026, Zhengzhou Guicai Technology Industry Co., Ltd. was born in Jinshui District. We are not simply manufacturing equipment; we are creating a philosophy: Guicai—Art unbounded by color mixing, Guicai empowers new vitality.
story.p3: "Gui" (Turtle) symbolizes longevity and resilience. We believe that every mixed color should withstand the test of time and environment, remaining eternal like a thousand-year-old turtle. "Cai" (Color) represents infinite colors and creativity. We empower with technology, allowing every drop of liquid to be precisely dispensed, releasing unprecedented artistic and industrial potential. "Guicai" sounds like "Gui Cai" (Genius), and we pay tribute to those bold and innovative geniuses—artists, designers, engineers—helping them find the source of inspiration in color mixing.
story.p4: Our 6 core R&D team members have been deeply cultivating the field of intelligent color mixing for many years, holding multiple independent patents, focusing on the R&D, production, and technical services of desktop color mixers and liquid precision dispensing equipment. From creative experiments in the laboratory to production line optimization in factories; from personalized blending of beauty trends to precise control of textile printing; from the infinite imagination of artistic creation to the durable protection of industrial coatings—our products and services cover the global color mixing and liquid dispensing industry, helping countless geniuses realize their dreams.
story.p5: Guicai is not just a company; it is a belief: Art unbounded by color mixing, Guicai empowers new vitality, making every drop of pigment an eternal masterpiece. Join us to create a longevity era of color and release the infinite brilliance of geniuses.

hero.title: Zhengzhou Guicai Technology
hero.subtitle: Art should not stop at color mixing, Guicai empowers you with new vitality.
hero.description: Founded on January 6, 2026, headquartered in Jinshui District, Zhengzhou. We are an innovative technology enterprise specializing in the R&D of intelligent desktop color mixing equipment, focusing on desktop color mixer technology and global technical services.

collision.desc: Exploring the infinite possibilities of color across different dimensions, where every collision sparks innovation.
